fields.name: Worksheet Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the worksheet template that the worksheet name is associated with.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies a name for the worksheet.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the worksheet.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code for which the worksheet should be used.

fields.name: Template Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the bin creation worksheet template, such as put-away, pick, or movement.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this worksheet.
